steps.title: Spot the antecedent and its number
steps.content: The blank refers to “the artworks” in the dependent clause. “The artworks” is plural—this is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree in number with the noun it refers to. Since “the artworks” is plural, the pronoun must be plural. Only “they” is plural; the others are singular. That matches choice B — B is correct.
